title: Dashboard Report
purpose: This spreadsheet is a quick and low-cost way to introduce your clients to management reporting. The sheet provides 15 or more financial ratios in a graph/ graphic view to help explain the importance of financial management to your clients.

title: E.O.Y Meeting
purpose: This framework is an excellent way to provide your clients with an 'experience' of facilitation. This enables them to understand the additional value you can provide, over core compliance services.

title: General Meeting Agenda
purpose: This template makes it easy to record the notes of meetings and directs the review of task success and key points of interest for the client.

title: PDF Storage
purpose: This page makes it easy to host or store valuable pdf documents.

title: FBT Questionnaire
purpose: This page makes it easy for your client to complete their answers to questions relating to Fringe Benefits
tags: Client End of Year Tax Forms

title: Growth Framework
purpose: The Growth Fundamentals Curve is a superb way to create 'self relevance' for your clients. In a nutshell, it's the fastest (& easiest) way to capture your clients attention, align your mutual understanding of their contextual position and assess their desire for change.

title: Client pre Meeting
purpose: This page contains a video and a presentation that explains the way people cope with adversity. It's the most practical way you can serve the topic of 'Wellness' for a business person as it helps them identify their dominant coping style so they can 'catch themselves' when fixated. 'Seeing themselves' is the critical first step in changing behaviour.

title: Covid Agendas
purpose: This template guides you through a 4 step business recovery plan. In New Zealand, the plan qualifies for NZTE (New Zealand Trade & Enterprise) funding support as it includes Critical Learning Points. The 4 point plan broadly covers Feasibility, Scenario Planning, Contingency Planning and Business Fundamentals Review.

title: Receivership vs Liquidation
purpose: Andrew Oorshot explains the difference between Receivership & Liquidation & offers the Creditor Compromise Regime as another option for those in severe business hardship. The key 'take-away' for many clients is the 'removing of negative stigma'; making it easier for clients to 'let go' and take immediate action.

title: Quick & Worst
purpose: This page contains the Quick Position model - used to identify the immediate finance position in relation to trading cycles and the Worst Case Valuation model - a Liquidation based review of the business net worth. (By the way, the Worst Case model is an EXCELLENT model to help business owners understand the best use of profits and clarify their investment risk position)

title: Insurance
purpose: This page allows your Client's Insurance advisor to complete a 'Summary Position' view of your mutual client's risk exposure.

title: Legal
purpose: This page allows your Client's Legal advisor to complete a 'Summary Position' view of your mutual client's legal exposure.

title: Loan Estimator
purpose: This page allows your Client's Finance advisor/ Banker to complete a 'Summary Position' view of your mutual client's credit lines. Again, this model helps you client to understand which assets provide easy liquidity and aids in your discussion of weather wealth should be captured inside the business, or outside. (or both)

title: Retirement Calcs
purpose: This page allows your Client's Financial advisor to complete a 'Summary Position' view of your mutual client's retirement exposure. The 'Use of Assets in Retirement' page supports End of Year meetings for non-trading clients.

title: Time Matters
purpose: This session provides practical tips on how to identify 'time leakage', how to prioritise and focus on the 20% of tasks that drive 80% of the profits and how to protect the time that's been reserved for 'critical tasks'.

title: Control Matters
purpose: This session guides a review of how the owner 'divides' their business mentally; how they segment the business in their mind when they're feeling overwhelmed. Knowing this is important when attempting to problem solve since the 'framework guides the focus'.

title: Money Matters
purpose: This session explains the 3 uses of profits which is useful for your client to remember when purchasing stock or assets; how previous profits have been utilised (as evidenced via a liquidation value review) and the summary of how bad debtors might be an indicator of failings outside the financial procedures.

title: Capacity, Capability, Opportunity
purpose: This framework helps you quickly disect the 'legitimate constraints' that are holding a business back. From here you can start to drill down into greater detail. A great conversation starter and a quick way to get a new prospect 'collaborating' with you, which is a powerful sales aid.

title: App Review
purpose: This template is designed to shift you into a 'Total needs approach' rather than a 'Campaign approach' when discussing software application solutions. This will better position you as a 'trusted advisor' and reduce the feeling of being an app' salesperson.

title: Assumptions
purpose: This template is designed to help add the 'flesh' to the conversation when collecting data to generate a cash forecast.(By aligning key business assumptions to financial KPI's or reports) It's a great way to help encourage clients to add the review component to their forecast solution and gets your team out of simply regurgitating data (which is then provided to a financial institution)

title: Customer Journey
purpose: This template is a 'lite' version of other sales related documents and chooses to focus on the customer journey (from first awareness to decision to purchase) and a basic problem solving flow-chart to help you find the source of your clients failing sales. You can use this document as a stand alone discussion (in less than 1 hr) or as an introduction to a more complete sales review if needed.

title: Debtor Protocols
purpose: This material aids in 'ramming the point home' to clients for the need to have disciplined procedures to recover their working capital. The message is aided by a spreadsheet model to highlight the long term affects of ignoring the message. Once the 'message is received' there are a range of practical suggestions that your client can employ to get paid quicker.

title: Demings Volatility
purpose: This template discusses Edwards Demings Theory of Volatility - it encourages people to accept that business goes up and down and to learn to properly interpret the data they're reviewing. Use this template to explain the clients cash volatility report so they can understand the vital importance of cash forecasts / budgets and regular cash management reviews. This tool is also extremely helpful in identifying and supporting the calculation of required working capital; use it to aid in the application for finance and to help the owners get clear on the dangers of running the business too low in cash reserves.

title: 1 pg Bizz Case
topic: Support the application for funding OR   Fault Diagnosis
purpose: This template guides your client via a simple 'Q&A' framework to articulate their business assumptions in regards to the Opportunity, The Model and The Proof. This same template could be easily modified to help you clarify the underlying 'faults' for a business in distress. (It differs from the 'Assumptions' template in that it doesn't seek to directly relate business beliefs to financial indicators.)

title: Lite Strategy
purpose: This template is a Google Doc version (like Microsoft Word) of a basic strategic plan. The most compelling aspects are the use of contrast models to identify the business owners expectations and the business development stages; these contrast models are the fastest way to achieve a sense of clarity and belief for your clients.

title: People vs. Process
purpose: This template seeks to guide you through the process of identifying the business practices, protocols, procedures (call them what you prefer) that need to be improved. Just as importantly, the template helps to define the overarching systems philosophy of your client SO THAT they can embark on an improvement process that best suits their existing habits, preferences and understanding. You will find the content a little m ore advanced but don't be put-off - just take the time to rehearse and you'll find it all makes practical sense in the end. (Especially when you flow-chart your client's practices and break-down the issues, one by one.).

title: Powerful Goal Setting
purpose: This template explains the 'correct' use of the S.M.A.R.T acronym for goal setting and explores how you can introduce it to your clients (who are) in need of a 'mental pick up'.

title: Productive Habits
purpose: This template is designed to help individuals 'catch themselves' when repeating negative behaviours or to understand what drives the mental state and productivity of themselves and their peers.

title: 8 Profit Levers
purpose: This template encourages your client to 'walk the customer's journey' and recognise the 'mini decisions' required to gain their business and deliver (profitably) to their expectations. It's also a FUNDAMENTAL framework to identify business growth potential by incremental changes, rather than drastic movements.

title: Org Chart Only
purpose: This template is an easy way to formulate an Organisation chart for your client as it uses a basic Role/ Reporting Line model to generate the chart. The template also explains the key reason to have 'lines of communication/Reporting' in the first place. (What it's for, and what it's NOT for)

title: Quick Fire Diagnosis
purpose: This template will form the basis of learning how to quickly diagnose the SOURCE of the business issue OR, the prioritised growth focus area. In short - if the business is in Distress perform triage in the session; if not, move forward with the rest of the template.

title: Rubbish In - Rubbish Out
purpose: This template focuses on the Chart of Accounts as a foundation for Reporting and Interpretation; it challenges the business owner to consider what's important for them to measure.

title: Working Capital Cycle
purpose: This template often achieves an 'A-ha' moment for th client as they understand the 'money in movement' and 'use of profits' principles. This is THE BEST FOUNDATION discussion you can have with a business owner that fails to understand the importance of regularly reviewing their financial accounts / performance.
tags: Cost of Being in Business vs

title: Planning Session
purpose: This section seeks to help your client align their income, risk and work hours expectations to their business model and lay a foundation of understanding between you both. The supporting document explains strategic language for those new to business planning.

title: Data Session
purpose: This section seeks to educate your client on the interpretation of data (Causation vs. Correlation) and provides foundation knowledge of accounting terminology, which allows you to expand the topic to meet the comprehension of your client and the complexity of their business. (You match the detail to the client) This template also helps you clarify the KPI's to use when working with this client going forward.

title: Lite Marketing
purpose: This section helps your client to identify their target customer and articulate how they add value; the very essence of Marketing is discussed by breaking it into its key components of "Who do you want to talk to?" - "What do you need to tell them?" - "How will you get your message to them?" and "How will you know they've heard you?" (The template also explains the foundation marketing concepts of Diffusion Theory & Product Lifecycle)

title: Sales Session
purpose: This section guides your client to break down the customer's journey, identify the logical decision points and to ensure that the sales process matches their industry or product. Whilst sales training basics are covered, you are not expected to be the next 'sales guru' but rather, provide the frameworks that let your client modify their sales tactics over time.
tags: 4 stages in psychology of the sale

title: People Session
purpose: This section explores the underlying drivers of employee satisfaction; how people naturally respond to learning new material, a proven model to assist with giving staff feedback correctly and, a challenging review of the leadership style that best meets the temperament of your client AND the industry/business requirements.

title: Process Session
purpose: This section explores the 'philosophy' of process improvement that may best serve your client and reminds them that 'just because it's tending, doesn't make it the best approach for you'. The section also explores practical ways to develop flowcharts to help clarify the system component that needs prioritised attention.

title: Alignment Statements
purpose: Ever wondered why business statements such as the 'Vision' statement or 'Mission' statement used to be popular and yet now, it seems to be about 'Your Why'? This template helps your client know 'Who' they're trying to talk to and WHAT they feel they need to 'say'.

title: 4 Part Bizz Plan
topic: Business Plan to Support Funding Application
purpose: This easy to complete business plan challenges your client to record their business assumptions, income & activity goals, Best World (Probable) capacity and then finishes with the 8 Profit Levers to drive their action plan going forward.

title: SWOT / PEST
purpose: This template provides a range of question prompts to support a SWOT review. The PEST (Political, Economic, Social & Technology) based questions ensure a comprehensive review of Internal Strengths & Weakness + External Opportunities & Threats.

title: Phone Techniques
purpose: This template begins with the question 'As a team, how do we wish to be judged in the marketplace?' - it goes on to explore the way a business communicates via phone to ensure the correct culture and business  etiquette is demonstrated.

title: Planning Outcomes Review
purpose: Use this document to help sell the planning session but also, to make sure the planning framework is focused on the correct business OUTCOMES. This document examines the 4 main planning domains; Business Model, Strategic Orientation, Organisational Function and Sales & Marketing.

title: Business Targets
purpose: This document is a complete replica of the Lite Fundamentals Planning doc - it just doesn't make any reference to the Lite Fundamentals programme to reduce confusion if you deliver it in isolation.

title: Orientation Part 1
purpose: This document explains the formal strategic planning process and the associated terminology. You may choose to provide it as 'pre-session reading' for your client or review it together prior to the Strategic Orientation 2 template.

title: Orientation Part 2
purpose: This document is designed to help your client take a challenging review of their business and its ability to cope with future threats and opportunities. Topics explored include Porter's 5 Forces, Progression of Economic Value, Vertical & Horizontal Integration, Market Diffussion Theory, Product Lifecycle, Technology Points, Sigmoid Curve, Blue Ocean Strategy, Revenue Streams, Risk Reward Matrix, Senge's Circles of Causality and the 8 Profit Levers.

title: Profit Levers & Blue Ocean
purpose: This template explores the Profit Levers and Blue Ocean strategy as a means to help your client identify their 'competition / differentiation' points. It's a smaller document than the others found in this section so suits those pushed for time or just 'dipping their toes in' to the task of strategic planning.

title: Organisational Review
purpose: A specific review of Communication & Reporting Channels, Divisional Roles and Individual’s Responsibilities in order to improve Efficiencies and Team Engagement. This is often supported with Business Culture, Core Values, Internal Insights Data and Cascaded Operational Objectives (Broken down into each layer  of team, then person)

title: Sales & Marketing Review
purpose: A specific review of How You Attract Attention to your Product or Service, How you then CONVERT Attention into Interest & Action so that finally, you secure their Custom. This includes Product features/improvement, Pricing, Packaging, Messaging Mediums (Social Media vs. Mainstream), Target  Customer Review, Brand Imagery, Distribution Options (Alliances), Customer Loyalty Programme

title: 80/20 Farm Plan
purpose: This template is designed to position the accountant within the 'Farm Advisor' discussions from the perspective of ensuring that Profitability is at the centre of decision making. (It is NOT designed to put you in a specialist role, nor create conflict between you and the farm consultant) The ideal outcome is the Farmer, Consultant and You sitting around the table together...

title: Nine Growth Aspects
purpose: The Nine Growth Aspects aim to balance the business owner's focus during intense periods of growth. You are encouraged to explore Process Improvement, Customer Focus, Sales, Authenticity, Inventory & Equipment, Team Focus, Innovation, Governance, Harmony & Balance.

title: Specialist Content 1
purpose: This is where you get to stamp your mark; a series of hosted pages specifically to help you tailor your service delivery to your clients...

title: Formal Risk Management
purpose: This model walks you through (step by step) the procedure of identifying, classifying and determining action steps to manage business risks for your clients. Critical steps include establishing context and is made 'simpler' by the graphic 'Heat Map' of risks; all of which makes for best practice procedures for the majority of your clients.

title: Governance Introduction
purpose: This template makes it easier to help your clients on their 'Governance Journey' by explaining the advantages/disadvantages of an Advisory Board (pay particular attention to terms of reference here) vs. a Formal Board Structure.

title: Programme Pages
topic: A Place to Share Your Own I.P
purpose: This section is a series of (12) hosted pages so you can add your own material and share it with the world... Not sure how to build a programme for your clients? No problem, there's plaenty of information to help you with that...

title: Remuneration & Incentives
purpose: This section makes it easier for you to facilitate a discussion about a business owner passing shares to an employee or, developing a profit share arrangement with staff. Pay particular notice to the 'pro's and con's page that relates to share transfer to staff - very helpful!

title: Partner Accountability
purpose: This template uses a 'points weighted matrix' to hold partners accountable in the areas of Ethics, Skills, Motivation and Work On vs In Performance. The system ultimately relies on a 'de-merit system' to help divide partnership profits - as a means to motivate & reward specific behaviours.

title: Stg. 1 Due Diligence
purpose: A short form due diligence option; perfect for small business purchases or as an initial board assessment prior to detailed investigation,

title: Financial Systems Review
purpose: The templates in this section begin by highlighting weak points within the financial systems of a business. It's designed to help the business owner better administrate their business and reduce 'business shrinkage'. Your firm may require audit division assistance to deliver this service in entirety.

title: Stock Policies
purpose: This is a 'Weighted Average' model to help your clients identify the criteria by which they prioritise their stock purchasing. Importantly, this model still allows for the 'Trader' skill-set of your client but attempts to 'reign-in' their stock purchasing towards items that drive the most profits...

title: Succession Planning
purpose: This section provides a framework to help you navigate the process of succession planning for your client. The process starts with a few 'pre-meeting' questions which the client completes and submits (via the portal) prior to your first meeting. One of the key differences about this framework is the use of a 'planning metaphor' to enable the respective parties to visualise the logical process and timelines ahead.

title: Farm Succession
purpose: As above but has 2 pages, more specific to the common points of disagreement for farmers and of course, the section refers to 'Farming' instead of 'Business' throughout.

title: Lease vs. Buy
purpose: This model makes it easy for you and your client to calculate the Financial difference between an outright purchase using cash or finance, vs an operating lease.

title: Labour Only
purpose: This model makes it easy for you and your client to calculate the Financial Capacity of their business and to explore their business assumptions whilst aligning you and the owner on their dreams and expectations.

title: Labour, Margin
purpose: This model makes it easy for you and your client to calculate the Financial Capacity of their business and to explore their business assumptions whilst aligning you and the owner on their dreams and expectations.

title: Labour, Margin, Sales
purpose: This model makes it easy for you and your client to calculate the Financial Capacity of their business and to explore their business assumptions whilst aligning you and the owner on their dreams and expectations.

purpose: This model makes it easy for you and your client to calculate the Financial Capacity of their business and to explore their business assumptions whilst aligning you and the owner on their dreams and expectations.

purpose: This model makes it easy for you and your client to calculate the Financial Capacity of their business and to explore their business assumptions whilst aligning you and the owner on their dreams and expectations.

title: Tour Operators
purpose: This model makes it easy for you and your client to calculate the Financial Capacity of their business and to explore their business assumptions whilst aligning you and the owner on their dreams and expectations.

title: Tours + Shop
purpose: This model makes it easy for you and your client to calculate the Financial Capacity of their business and to explore their business assumptions whilst aligning you and the owner on their dreams and expectations.

title: Trucking/ Haulage
purpose: This model makes it easy for you and your client to calculate the Financial Capacity of their business and to explore their business assumptions whilst aligning you and the owner on their dreams and expectations.

title: Volatility Scenario
purpose: This model makes it easy for you and your client to calculate the Financial Capacity of their business and to explore their business assumptions whilst aligning you and the owner on their dreams and expectations.

title: Wages Review
purpose: This model makes it easy for you and your client to calculate the Financial Capacity of their business and to explore their business assumptions whilst aligning you and the owner on their dreams and expectations.

title: Workshop / Program Sales
purpose: This model makes it easy for you and your client to calculate the Financial Capacity of their business and to explore their business assumptions whilst aligning you and the owner on their dreams and expectations.

title: Worst Case Scenario
purpose: This model makes it easy for you and your client to calculate the Financial Capacity of their business and to explore their business assumptions whilst aligning you and the owner on their dreams and expectations.

title: Physiotherapy
purpose: This model makes it easy for you and your client to calculate the Financial Capacity of their business and to explore their business assumptions whilst aligning you and the owner on their dreams and expectations.

title: Dentist
purpose: This model makes it easy for you and your client to calculate the Financial Capacity of their business and to explore their business assumptions whilst aligning you and the owner on their dreams and expectations.

title: Finance & Depreciation
purpose: This model makes it easy to calculate the finance costs and schedule the expected depreciation for your client.

title: Personal Budget
purpose: Use this model to identify household expenses that may qualify for tax deductions and to quantify the income needed to maintain a healthy home existence.

title: High Level Budget
purpose: This model provides a quick and easy format to record key sales targets and major expenses. Great for 'first timers' who are building their financial confidence.

title: Hiring Winners
purpose: This framework is an excellent way to review your client's hiring and team structure assumptions. The content drops into advanced topics but maintains a 'practical' view in order to make it more workable for a wider range of clients. A must for anyone struggling with staff issues.

title: Landscaping & Maintainence
purpose: Use the model to calculate your business earnings potential.

title: Homeware Sales
purpose: Use this revenue model to determine the growth potential of your client's business.

title: Porters & Pine
purpose: The Porters 5 forces framework is an excellent model to guide a strategic review of your client's business. The Progression of Value (by Joseph Pine) is an excellent supporting framework for this same discussion.

title: Pivot
purpose: The Pivot template will guide you through the Strategic considerations required to determine if a shift in strategy is the best option for your client. This template is a collection of frameworks, some of which your client may have already completed elsewhere within Advisor-e.

title: E Mails
purpose: The emails found on this page can be used to invite new clients to the portal and advise them of the login authentication email they can expect to receive.

title: Section Overview
purpose: To aid in the calculation of activity and financial variables. From a facilitative point of view, how to use Revenue Models to shift the ‘burden of proof’ away from you and towards the client’s business model.

title: Manufacturing
purpose: Explore this model as a means to determine peak production capabilities and the effects of shut down periods on your manufacturing business.

title: Force Field Analysis
purpose:
This 'behind the scenes' template is designed to show you how to facilitate a session that requires people to 'let go' of previous positions, behaviours and decisions.
If you want people to adopt a new approach or improve business relations, this template may be just what you need!

title: Advisory Pricing Model
purpose: The advisory pricing model provides guidance on a range of advisory service solutions in terms of communicating the objectives of the session, estimating time for said engagement and calculating the fee for services offered.

title: 5 Layers Questionnaire
purpose: The 5 Layers Questionnaire is a base document to help you conduct a client discovery meeting for the purpose of identifying underlying issues, to support your advisory service proposal. This discovery document forms part of the Total Needs sales approach.

title: Advisory Proposal
purpose: This (general purpose) advisory service proposal is designed to help you communicate your service offer in a manner that aligns with the psychology of the sale.

title: Mgt Annual Plan
purpose: This template is designed to help you introduce more structure to your regular management meetings. Whilst similar to an annual board plan, this template is more focused towards business improvement areas, rather than board/director performance.

title: Outbound Emails
purpose: These emails provide a range of suggestions for how you might respond to a request for additional services; how you might propose your service offer in stages and how you can use a feasibility process to initiate the engagement process. (Get paid while you scope the job)

title: Coaching Content
purpose: The notes contained in this document are a summary of the training notes that relate to skills based coaching sessions. Many of the notes may also be found in other documents throughout Advisor-e but this makes it easier to find and reference. Content includes Sales Training & Conflict Facilitation.

title: My Improvement Plan
purpose: This template is designed to enable a discussion to help advance the culture of the firm by soliciting team member's thoughts regarding the future risks, considerations and strategy of the firm. This template suits those team members who are NOT expected to grow a fee base.

title: Lite Fundamentals Proposal
purpose: The Lite Fundamentals proposal document is a merge table (enabled) template that explains what the programme covers, how it helps your client and presents both the fee and the variation to scope agreement to reduce 'job creep'.

title: Sales Psychology
purpose: This page highlights the sales psychology basics that allow you to develop your sales skills and structure your proceedings (and review in hindsight) to win more business.

title: Advisor Prep
purpose: This advisor prep page reveals how you register for funding with the NZTE Business Support Funding Programme and provides ideas for how you can package, price and present a 'coaching' based programme in order to qualify for (financial) Govt' support for your clients.

title: Messaging Plan
purpose: This template helps you design your outbound messaging plan to help you attract more 'A' clients.

title: Lite Feasibility
purpose: This template is a short-form template (just 7 questions) to help clarify the assumptions of your client. This template can be used in isolation but is most likely to be relevant for clients that have requested a cashflow forecast to support their finance application.

title: Dashboard Discussions
purpose:
This template helps you to explore the different performance and activity ratio reports (available in the Advisor-e financial dashboard) with your clients.

This page also includes the 7 Cash Drivers template which is another tool to help prepare your clients for finan management reporting services.

title: Ratio Analysis
purpose:
This template explores the plus and minus of benchmark data and raises the concerns about 'when data doesn't count'.  This template may also assist in developing KPI's.

The same page includes a spreadsheet to introduce your client to the concept of Common Size trend analysis

title: Key Interviews
purpose: This template provides a range of questions to interview Staff, Financial Controller, Key Customers & Key Supplier. You can use this resource as part of your DD process or you can use them as stand alone feedback questionnaires.

title: Asset Review
purpose: This model helps you identify the assets of merging businesses and assess the value to the combined operation going forward.

title: Porter's Revenue
purpose: This framework explores the revenue potential and risk from alternative (revenue generating) activities. You can use this as part of your DD process or use it as a supporting framework for your strategic planning or feasibility engagements.

title: Purchase Assessment Report 3
purpose: This assessment report provides an indicative business value for your client and explores the multiple aspects to be considered prior to purchase. The report raises the issue of payback period, super profits and margin of error calculations for cash surplus.

title: Coaching Outcome Statements
purpose: This template helps you define the outcome expectations of those undertaking advisory coaching within your firm and breaks the advisory journey into progressive learning layers.

title: Planning Templates Directory
purpose: This document highlights the numerous templates, models and software features within Advisor-e that relate to the Strategic Planning and Team Development of your firm.

title: Pitch Deck
purpose: This (blank) Pitch Deck is designed to help guide you in the communication of your solution advantages to prospective investors to help secure business capital.

title: Planning Tools Directory
purpose: This template guides you to the range of templates, models and software features that specifically relate to the internal planning and team development needs of your business.

title: Structure Options
purpose: This template is an entry level introduction to clients wishing to learn about their business structure options. The template introduces the concept of risk mitigation and future saleability but does not go into detailed explanation of topics such as tax or estate protection.

title: 90 Day Best Practice Accounting
purpose: This template (and resource section) is about coaching your clients to be more confident and robust in their accounting methods. The template provides a broad outline of how you might present your coaching, via a series of meetngs, and provides an environment to host support videos.

title: Activity Ratios
purpose: This template can be found at the bottom of the Working Capital Cycle page. The template explores a range of cash management ratios and explains both theory and 'real world' implications.

title: Business Sale Assessment 1
purpose: This 'landing page' describes the process of selling a business and gives business owners insight into what lies ahead, should they choose to sell their business.

title: Indicative Value Questions
purpose: This questionnaire helps to orient you in the process of determining an indicative value and is a valuable first step in the valuation process.

title: Business Purchase Assessment 1
purpose: This 'landing page' describes the process of purchasing a business and gives business owners insight into what lies ahead. It's a great way to 'prime' your client for an inital feasibility meeting.

title: Purchase Assessment Model 2
purpose: This indicative value model applies to someone who is thinking of BUYING a business - the model layout is similar to that of the business sale assessment model but it ONLY links to the business purchase assessment report.

title: Business Insurance Model
purpose: This model helps to calculate the Share transfer and Key Person  insurance levels to make it easier for business owners to determine an appropriate cover for their needs.

title: Gift Approach Letters
purpose: These pre approach letters utilise a gift to help with the positioning of your intial approach.

title: Phone Scripts
purpose: These phone script templates provide suggestions for how you could deal with targeted approaches.

title: Total Needs Sales Scripts
purpose: These templates help you understand the psychology behind the total needs sales process, and provide practical scripts for you to rehearse and edit (when comfortable) to ensure your delivery is authentic. Rehearsing these is the fastest way to learn to sell professionally.

title: Sales Psychology (Basics)
purpose: This video provides a foundational understanding of the psychology of the sale. A 'must view' for those who have not been formally trained in selling advisory services.

title: Lite Fundamentals
purpose: How to secure on-going management/ business improvement engagements using the Lite Fundamentals framework. Step by step instructions show you the use of pre-approach quizzes and all the visual aids and sales scripts to help you win! (note: the video is the same video as shown in the concept meeting)

title: The Nature of Engagement
purpose: This video explains the relationship dynamics and client awareness (levels) that drive the different types of engagements that you'll secure. Understanding the difference will help guide you in your dealings when selling or scoping.

title: The 5 Steps in the Advisory Staircase
purpose: The progressive stages of engaging with a client; how to present 'solution layers'.

title: The Heald Matrix
purpose: How to re-frame business planning in the mind of your client and (at the same time) position yourself as a strategic advisor. (This is a perfect framework for learning how to facilitate effectively)

title: Section Brief
purpose: How to use Revenue Models to shift the ‘burden of proof’ away from you and towards the client’s business model.

title: Your Sales Process Decision Tree
purpose: Understand the different approach options and how to modify your approach to suit existing relationship dynamics.

title: Business Clock vs Body Clock
purpose: This template explores the difference between efficiency and effectiveness, what blocks your creativity, how to work within your own body rythm and cope with feelings of overwhelm. (All the stuff that comes with being a business owner.)

title: Quick Fire Diagnosis
purpose: This template helps to 'flush out' the problem areas within a business by providing a 'process of elimination' approach to clarifying the core issue/s. The basic triage framework starts with Get Organised, Get the Job and Do the Job and cascades down from there.

title: 6 Hats
purpose: This template is an (essential) foundation template to improve team problem solving techniques and meeting conduct. You can use this framework in the board room one day, and with a small start up team the next.

title: Lite Fundamentals Visual Aids
purpose: How to use on-line quizzes to 'prime' clients; how to frame a sales meeting and use visual aids & scenario models to follow the psychology of the sale, whilst reducing tension.

title: Business Dating
purpose: How to help your client approach a merger or aquisition with a more progressive, longer term outlook to improve the chances of successful (combined) team and management culture.

title: Capacity, Capability, Opportunity
purpose: Your clients can't see this page as it's designed to help you build your confidence and ultimately - help you position in the eyes of your client. Take the time to rehearse the framework with others; together your rate of learning will grow...

title: What's Applicable
purpose: This session is designed to stimulate a review of how technology can be COMBINED with existing business procedures to achieve more effctive outcomes for all.

title: HOPE Recession Model
purpose: This template explores the observable traits of a failing economy so that you and your clients can discuss the macro position and the implications to their business. (It's a great way to 'talk your client down' from taking large risks in a depressed economy.)

title: Advisor Prep
purpose: This advisor preparation page helps you to explore the business sale assessment section so you can become familiar with the indicative value model, the report, and the sensitivity calculations that guide you in your indicative value assessment.

title: Sale Assessment Model 2
purpose: This indicative value model applies to someone who is thinking of SELLING a business - the model layout is similar to that of the business sale assessment model but it ONLY links to the business sale assessment report.

title: Sale Assessment Report 3
purpose: This sale assessment report provides an indicative business value for your client and explores the multiple aspects to be considered prior to sale. The report raises the issue of payback period, super profits and margin of error calculations for cash surplus, from a purchaser's perspective so your c

title: Messaging Plan
purpose: This template helps you design your outbound messaging plan to help attract more 'A' clients. The framework explores common client problems, your solution, the medium, frequency and content layers as part of an annual plan to communicate your value to new and existing clients.

title: Paper Tower
purpose: These (team) problem solving templates provide a practical means to observe members work together and allows you to introduce a structured approach to dealing with problems in future.

title: Hire Winners
purpose: This (internal) template explores the process of identifying winning and diverse temperament, skills and character traits. For many, the idea of diversity has been generally accepted. Few however, comprehend that it's only with an understanding of personality types, can it prove effective.

title: My Fee Growth Plan
purpose: This template is designed to help those on the Partnership Pathway to be clear on who to target, what to communicate and the sheer level of activity required to (organically) grow a fee base. 'A' client profile, logistics and marketing statements (BBQ statements) are all part of the content covered

title: My Network/Entertainment Schedule
purpose: This template works on the belief that a clear allocation of resources can aid in the planning of pro-active networking tactics. In short, the allocation of both time and budget will then help define WHO best to target, WHAT outcomes are expected and HOW MUCH resource should be used to be effective.

title: Online Quiz Summary
purpose: This template highlights the purpose behind the online quiz options provided. Quizzes provide a useful 'Priming' role to help shape the understanding of your client and additionally, helps to build the DESIRE to act.

title: Video Hyperlinks
purpose:
This document provides a brief description of the video and its (paired) hyperlink to help you decide which video could best help to shape the nature of discussion with your client. Excellent PRIMING resource! 
(The video hyperlinks relate to unbranded 'concept' videos.)

title: Website Blurbs
purpose: This document provides 'tips n tricks' to aid in the design of your firm's website. The tactics suggested here may, in turn, be passed to your clients as an additional resource.

title: The Helicopter Story
purpose: This delivery is a superb way to plant the seed for a client and is really useful if presented in a seminar environment to aid in the positioning of you as a strategic advisor. It takes time to learn but works - (69% of the time - everytime! :)

title: Call Reluctance Psychology
purpose: This video explains the psychology of call reluctance; what it is, what causes it and what you can do about it. A must watch for anyone new to selling.

title: Winning Management Reporting
purpose: This document explores why clients struggle to get excited about management reporting services and what you can do about it. In particular, it explores the 5 'current states' your clients could be in and the appropriate template to help move them forward.

title: Campaign Intro Options
purpose: This page holds 3 templates; each of which could prove useful to aid in the positioning of you as an advisor to a new client/prospect. Learn them all and be ready to 'change up' if the meeting environment requires.

title: Centre of Influence Scripts
purpose: This page holds 4 templates that explain both the process and provides specific (word for word examples) for you to develop your business networks. Everything you need to know is here - you just have to practice!

title: Platinum Case Study
purpose: This template provides the meeting structure to help team members prepare and present their client case study material. Organising structured reviews enables a visible learning culture which is critical to a firm's advisory journey.

title: Quickfire Advisory Directory
purpose: Use this quick fire directory to identify the 80/20 templates to help you serve your clients. If, as an advisor, you became proficient in just the templates listed in this directory, you would be significantly better trained to deliver advisory services to your clients than 90% of accountants.

title: My CPD Log
purpose: Use this content table to track the learning time you've invested. You can add your own content to the table and easily produce a report for management or association bodies to show your learning progress.

title: Advisory Playsheets
purpose: The advisory playsheets help guide you through the 'thought logic' to determine which template is more appropriate to your client's circumstance, and your own personal experience & confidence levels. These playsheets assist with your diagnosis and service solution.

title: Learning Graphics
purpose:
This is a collection of concept graphics that relate to an advisor's learning journey.
The 5 Steps in the Advisory Staircase, The Professional's Journey, The 3 Types of Engagement, The Progressive Learning Path (to Wisdom) and The Emotional Reaction to Learning are all included.

title: Growth Curve Checklist
purpose: The growth curve checklist is your team's reference (list) to identify service (template) solutions for clients at each stage of the growth curve. It's about anticipating your client's issues and getting the right team member resourced, trained (& confident) in advance.

title: Free Draw 3x3
purpose: This template and the tutorial video (underneath) will make it easy for you to reveal the growth (fundamentals) framework to your clients in a low pressure manner. (Especially useful for you to draw on a napkin at a coffee shop!)

title: EOY Quiz
purpose: The EOY quiz is a great way to 'prime' your client for their end of year meeting. For starters, it gets them thinking about their strengths, weaknesses & satisfaction levels (& you learn what they are) but more importanly, it signals your intention to discuss more than just their accounts.

title: Turnaround Behaviours
purpose: This framework helps the team to decide how they want to be 'talked about' in their marketplace. The framework then explores practical steps for service improvement. (This example showcases a cafe but many in retail will find it applicable)

title: BNZ Templates
purpose: These templates are specific to the BNZ in support of loan applications. If your client is needing a template as a requirement for a loan, perhaps check with their bank if they have a strict format to follow.

title: Baking Apple Pie
purpose: Build closer relations by helping your client bake an apple pie

title: EBITDA
purpose: This model is used to help calculate EBITDA and Discounted Future Cashflows to assess share values. Whilst both calculations carry a degree of controvesy when compared to 'real-world' values, understanding the methods will prove educational when completing your indicative value engagements.

title: Common Problem Stories
purpose: Use the Event, Cause & Effect framework to develop your Common Problem Stories for use with sales prospects who are reluctant to engage. This framework serves as a Facilitative approach to probem solving and/or a soft sales method for introduction (first) meetings.

title: Board Member Conduct
purpose: This template seeks to offer practical insights for how to deal with disruptive board members. The content in this template will also prove useful to those presenting or 'pitching' to a board.

title: Annual Board Plan
purpose: This template records the board's intentions to deal with certain business topics/issues and schedules their sequence throughout the year. Issues include both business performance and board member/director performance.

title: Draft White Papers
purpose: This template guides the reader through the process of writing a white paper. It seeks to solve the common problem facing many board chairman, that of members 'dumping' their problem in a board meeting without offering suggestions to resolve or identify the issue  accurately.

title: Quality Decisions
purpose: This template seeks to highlight the importance of robust decision making frameworks. This is critical since many in board positions become fixated on meeting protocol, at the cost of robust debate and decisive decisions.

title: Leadership Review
purpose: This template shines a light on the requirements for leadership styles to be 'best matched' to industry, business team and leader personality type. All to often leaders can be misled into following the latest 'trend' on leadership; this template challenges a leaders understanding of the topic.

title: Customer Reliance
purpose: This spreadsheet is used to calculate the financial dependency on clients. It allows for the ascending order and proportion to be made known. An example would be the 80/20 rule - does 80% of sales come from 20% of clients etc. Particularly important in due diligence but useful for any client.

title: Location Review
purpose: This spreadsheet aids the due diligence process by assessing regional market potential, thus helping to assess future growth potential and serviceability 'cross-over' between multiple branches. This model can also be used to support in depth marketing reviews for any business.

title: Supply Chain Review
purpose: This spreadhseet allows you to calculate the 'delay days' of key supplies as part of your supply chain risk assessment. Again, whilst useful for due diligence engagements, this execrcise is valuable to support any growth programme or governance proceedings.

title: Margin vs Markup
purpose: This model makes it easy for you to explain pricing tactics to your clients.

title: Labour Margin Mix
purpose:
This model makes it easy for you and your client to calculate the Financial Capacity of their business and to explore their business assumptions whilst aligning you and the owner on their dreams and expectations.
This model differs from other labour margin by allowing more job type break-down.

title: Sales Dashboard
purpose: This model provides a dashboard example of how you could review the performance of a sales team and the product mix of a business.

title: Finance and Depreciation
purpose: This model makes it easy to explain the finance and depreciation costs of an asset purchase. This would be well supported by an industry specific what-if model and the Lite Feasibility template as part of your comprehensive solution.

title: Dry Stock Farming
purpose: This model is part of the Rural package aimed at dry stock farmers. This model makes it easy for you and your client to calculate the Financial Capacity of their farm and to explore their financial assumptions whilst aligning you and the owner on their dreams and expectations.

title: Marine Harvest
purpose:
This model relates to the harvest contractor aspects of mussel farming. 
The model makes it easy for you and your client to calculate the Financial Capacity of their business and to explore their business assumptions whilst aligning you and the owner on their dreams and expectations.

title: Mussel Farm 2
purpose:
This model relates specifically to mussel farming. 
The model makes it easy for you and your client to calculate the Financial Capacity of their business and to explore their business assumptions whilst aligning you and the owner on their dreams and expectations.

title: Real Estate Office
purpose:
This model relates specifically to the calculation of revenue and sales commissions for a real estate office.
The model makes it easy for you and your client to calculate the Financial Capacity of their business and to explore their business assumptions.

title: Farm House Budget
purpose: This model makes it easy for you and your farming clients to explore their home budget constraints as part of their overall farming budgets.

title: Doctor
purpose: This model makes it easy for you and your client to calculate the Financial Capacity of their practice and explore their business assumptions whilst aligning you and the owner on their dreams and expectations.

title: Health Spa
purpose: This model makes it easy for you and your client to calculate the Financial Capacity of their business and explore their business assumptions whilst aligning you and the owner on their dreams and expectations.

title: Support Person
purpose:
This model relates to those in the 'care-support' roles within the private health sector.
The model makes it easy for you and your client to calculate the Financial Capacity of their practice and to explore their business assumptions whilst aligning you and the owner on their dreams and expectation.

purpose: This model relates to hire services & makes it easy for you and your client to calculate the Financial Capacity of their business and to explore their business assumptions whilst aligning you and the owner on their dreams and expectations.

purpose: This model makes it easy for you and your client to calculate the Financial Capacity of their business and to explore their business assumptions whilst aligning you and the owner on their dreams and expectations.

purpose: This model makes it easy for you and your client to calculate the Financial Capacity of their business and to explore their business assumptions whilst aligning you and the owner on their dreams and expectations.

title: Pet Shop
purpose: This model makes it easy for you and your client to calculate the Financial Capacity of their business and to explore their business assumptions whilst aligning you and the owner on their dreams and expectations.

title: Entry Fee
purpose: This model makes it easy for you and your client to calculate the Financial Capacity of their business and to explore their business assumptions whilst aligning you and the owner on their dreams and expectations.

title: Sales Teams
purpose: This model focus on the sales activity and commission levels of a sales team, using a multi tiered earnings structure to determine business margins and potential salesperson rewards.

title: Drilling & Pumps
purpose: This model makes it easy for you and your client to calculate the Financial Capacity of their business and to explore their business assumptions whilst aligning you and the owner on their dreams and expectations.

title: Fencing Cost pr Mtr
purpose: This model makes it easy for you and your client to calculate the Financial Capacity of their business and to explore their business assumptions whilst aligning you and the owner on their dreams and expectations.

title: Butcher
purpose: This model makes it easy for you and your client to calculate the Financial Capacity of their business and to explore their business assumptions whilst aligning you and the owner on their dreams and expectations.

title: Cleaners
purpose: This model makes it easy for you and your client to calculate the Financial Capacity of their business and to explore their business assumptions whilst aligning you and the owner on their dreams and expectations.

title: Consultancy Pricing
purpose: This model focuses on the different pricing 'layers' that can be applied to design, preparation, travel, delivery and long term support for consultants. It may not determine the actual fee being charged, but serves as a strong indicator for where negotiations should start.

title: Financial Advisor
purpose: This model enables the financial advisor to determine where best to focus their efforts. Based on client profiles, all sales activity is run through conversion calculations to deliver a cash forecast.

title: IT Services
purpose: This model makes it easy for you and your client to calculate the Financial Capacity of their business and to explore their business assumptions whilst aligning you and the owner on their dreams and expectations.
